author: Alice
text: Does anyone have good resources for learning about neural networks?

author: Bob
text: I found this great tutorial series on YouTube. Very comprehensive.

author: Carol
text: The textbook chapter 3 covers it well too.

author: Dan
text: I prefer the research papers. They give more depth.

author: Eve
text: Papers are difficult. I recommend starting with the tutorial first.

author: Frank
text: Does anyone know good open-source libraries for data preprocessing?

author: Grace
text: Pandas is the standard choice for most projects.

author: Henry
text: For specialized tasks, scikit-learn also has useful utilities.

author: Alice
text: I've been using Polars recently. It's faster than Pandas.
